creator: wea@llnl.gov
text:
>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>Originator:     Ed Alley
>Organization:
>Confidential:   no
>Synopsis:       Updated Yorick port
>Severity:       non-critical
>Priority:       high
>Category:       ports
>Release:        FreeBSD 4.3-RELEASE i386
>Class:          change-request
>Environment: 

	System: FreeBSD jordan.llnl.gov 4.3-RELEASE wea@jordan.llnl.gov

>Description: 

	I have submitted a port update for the Yorick port on
	Sep 05 16:50:00 PDT 2001.

	It updates Yorick from version 1.4.1 to 1.5.

	I mistakenly put my name as the Originator!

>Fix: 

	 The originator line should read (as before):

		Whom:	Pedro F. Giffuni <giffunip@asme.org>

	NOT ME!

	I'm not sure what the date should be: the date of
	the original commital or the date of the latest
	update?

	Also:

	In talking to Pedro we decided that I should be the
	maintainer of this version of Yorick. So the maintainer
	line should read:

		MAINTAINER=  wea@llnl.gov

	which is my e-mail address. Thank-you in advance and
	sorry for this mixup.

			Ed Alley
			wea@llnl.gov
